data.content: Implementation review approved. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, 2261 tests, build). Shared version-update-action.ts correctly extracts clipboard update logic into reusable hook consumed by both version badge and banner. Banner shows 'Update now' link button only when update available, triggers same clipboard-copy behavior as existing popover flow, and shows 'Copied update command' feedback. Tests cover the shared trigger (success + failure) and banner rendering/click wiring. No security issues, no invariant violations.
